title: Bulk Chicken and Rice Meal Prep Base
description: A simple, high-protein chicken and rice base designed for batch cooking and reuse across multiple meals like bowls, wraps, and stir-fries.
instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions using water or chicken broth.
Season chicken with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Heat oil in a large pan or pot over medium heat.
Cook chicken in batches until fully cooked, then remove and set aside.
In the same pan, sauté onions, peppers, and garlic until softened.
Slice or shred the cooked chicken.
Combine chicken with vegetables or keep separate for flexible use.
Portion rice and chicken mixture into containers for storage.

storage.reheat_instructions: Microwave with a splash of water or broth for 1-2 minutes, or heat in a skillet over medium heat until warmed through.

batch_notes: Cook all chicken at once and portion for multiple meals.
Rice and vegetables can be reused across bowls, wraps, and stir-fries.
meal_variations: Chicken rice bowls with added sauce or dressing
Chicken wraps with tortillas and lettuce
Quick chicken stir-fry with soy sauce
Chicken burrito bowls with beans and salsa
